_note: PROMOTIONS — the approved art. `npm run import-assets` resolves the LATEST source version per the asset-version rule (WATER-SPEC), optimizes it, and writes the approved output + a resolved runtime manifest (approved/manifest.json). Raw assets NOT listed here are NEVER integrated. To promote a new asset, add an entry and re-run.
assetVersionRule: When multiple versions of a source exist, always use the LATEST (highest vN filename suffix, then newest file date). Older versions are superseded; never mix elements across generations.

promotions.use: shared rock revealed on steep slopes (TERRAIN §5)
sedimentary cliff walls on impassable mountain faces (TERRAIN §2c)
scree in gullies / lower mountain slopes (TERRAIN §2b)
color-anchor source for the water gradient/foam (WATER §2/§4) — NEVER applied as a texture
